summary: Plan-only classification: keep #75165 as the live canonical implementation PR, keep #77981 open as its related product/tracking issue, and treat linked #77622 as closed historical proof-gate context only. No GitHub mutations, merge, fix PR, or closeout is recommended from this plan.
